sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112310" key="frh/tarxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρήταρχ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n112310.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φρατρίαρχος</ref></xr>, ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">759</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.).</sense> </entryFree>
